overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-lit commercial district in Night City. The player character walks along covered sidewalks and open plazas featuring holographic advertisements, palm trees, and digital billboards, eventually approaching a stairway with orange railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial sidewalk with neon signage

events.description: passing pedestrian in orange jacket walking in opposite direction
exiting covered walkway into open plaza area

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk next to the street, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket and green pants walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: large red neon sign reading TURBO mounted overhead on the building facade
bright orange metal safety railing separating sidewalk from the street
massive structural concrete pillars lining the left side of the walkway
large illuminated vertical advertisement displaying a woman with text TASTE

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a covered commercial sidewalk at night, illuminated by neon signs. The camera moves forward past a pedestrian in an orange jacket, with large concrete pillars on the left and an orange railing along the street on the right. The TURBO neon sign is visible overhead as the walkway opens into a plaza.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with palm trees and holographic advertisements

events.description: entering open plaza area with palm trees in concrete planters
holographic advertisement stands with pink-haired character come into view

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, navigating around palm tree planters

entered.detail: large palm trees planted in circular concrete planters scattered throughout the plaza
massive overhead digital billboard displaying DARRA advertisement with a character holding a weapon
tall advertising stands with rotating holographic displays of a pink-haired character

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza paved with tiles and dotted with palm trees in concrete planters. The DARRA billboard looms overhead while holographic advertising stands featuring a pink-haired character line the path. The environment shifts from enclosed to open with partial sky visibility between the towering buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: corridor with holographic advertisements leading to stairs

events.description: slight turn toward the stairway entrance as holographic stands are passed
scattered newspapers and debris visible on the tiled ground

agents.ego_description: walking through the advertisement corridor, approaching the stairway with orange railings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking ahead toward the stairs in the distance

entered.detail: stairway with concrete steps and bright orange handrails leading to an upper level
multiple digital screens displaying advertisements above the stairway entrance

segments.scene_description: Moving through a semi-covered corridor lined with holographic advertisement stands, the camera approaches a stairway with distinctive orange railings. The DARRA billboard remains visible overhead while the environment becomes more enclosed. The ground shows scattered debris and newspapers as the stairs become the focal point ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: stairway junction connecting upper and lower pedestrian levels

events.description: approaching the base of the stairs while pedestrians cross the path
pedestrians ascending and descending the stairs create crossing traffic

agents.ego_description: approaching the stairway junction, observing pedestrians moving between upper and lower levels

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending the stairs toward the camera
pedestrian ascending the stairs away from the camera

entered.detail: large digital billboard with pink neon text on the right wall
view of the lower street level visible through the passage ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment focuses on the stairway junction with bright orange railings on the left. Multiple pedestrians are seen ascending and descending the stairs, creating a moderate crowd density. A digital billboard with pink neon text appears on the right wall as the camera approaches the intersection of upper and lower pedestrian walkways.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from a covered sidewalk into an open plaza before narrowing toward a crowded stairway. It begins on a sheltered walkway illuminated by neon signs, moving past a pedestrian in an orange jacket and under a TURBO sign as the path opens up. As the camera enters a wide, tiled plaza, the environment shifts from enclosed to open, passing palm trees in concrete planters and holographic advertisements featuring a pink-haired character beneath a looming DARRA billboard. The scene then moves into a semi-covered corridor where the space tightens again, gliding over scattered debris and newspapers toward a set of stairs with distinctive orange railings. Finally, the camera approaches a bustling intersection of pedestrian walkways, where a crowd of people ascends and descends the stairs beside a digital billboard with pink neon text.
